title: Freshsales vs Mailchimp
description: Compare Freshsales vs Mailchimp — a crm & sales platform versus a marketing & seo solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Freshsales (CRM & Sales) and Mailchimp (Marketing & SEO) serve different primary purposes. Freshsales has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is crm & sales or marketing & seo capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Freshsales and Mailchimp?
faqs.answer: Freshsales is a crm & sales tool, while Mailchimp is a marketing & seo platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Freshsales replace Mailchimp?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Freshsales or Mailchimp?
faqs.answer: Freshsales ($9–$69/user/mo) and Mailchimp (Free – $299/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
